description: Letter in Judaeo-Arabic. Full of glimpses of interesting subjects. The writer complains about the heavy rain this winter; he mentions the customs tax (maks); the great "ḥamas"; there is a section on the "shaḥn(?) of the mats for the 'house' of the Sayyid Eliyyahu (the Prophet?)"—it seems some sort of work requiring measurements to be taken; mentions the shrine at Dammūh; and finally mentions copies of manuscripts and drugs that either have been sent or are to be sent.
description_he: מכתב ביהודית-ערבית. מלא הצצות לנושאים מעניינים: גשמים כבדים בחורף, מכס, 'החמס' הגדול, מדידות לבית ה'שיוד אליהו', המקדש בדמוח, ועתקי כתבי יד ותרופות.
